name: AppType
description: The type of an application. For a list of supported values, see [The Application Entity](normalization-entity-application.md#apptype).

name: Boolean
description: Use the built-in KQL `bool` data type rather than a numerical or string representation of Boolean values.

name: ConfidenceLevel
description: A confidence level normalized to the range of 0 to a 100.

name: Country
description:
A string using [ISO 3166-1](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html), according to the following priority:

- Alpha-2 codes, such as `US` for the United States.
- Alpha-3 codes, such as `USA` for the United States.
- Short name.

The list of codes can be found on the [International Standards Organization (ISO) website](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search).

name: DeviceType
description:
The type of the device stored in DeviceType fields. Possible values include:
- `Computer`
- `Mobile Device`
- `IOT Device`
- `Other`. For more information, see [The Device entity](normalization-entity-device.md).

name: DnsQueryClassName
description: The [DNS class name](https://www.iana.org/assignments/dns-parameters/dns-parameters.xhtml).

name: Domain
description: the domain part of an FQDN, without the hostname, for example, `learn.microsoft.com`. For more information, see [The Device entity](normalization-entity-device.md).

name: DomainType
description: The type of domain stored in domain and FQDN fields. For a list of values and more information, see [The Device entity](normalization-entity-device.md).

name: DvcIdType
description: The type of the device ID stored in DvcId fields. For a list of allowed values and further information, refer to [DvcIdType](normalization-entity-device.md#dvcidtype).

name: Enumerated
description: A list of values as explicitly defined for the field. The schema definition lists the accepted values.

name: FQDN
description: A fully qualified domain name using a dot notation, for example, `learn.microsoft.com`. For more information, see [The Device entity](normalization-entity-device.md).

name: Hostname
description: A hostname that isn't an FQDN, includes up to 63 characters including letters, numbers, and hyphens. For more information, see [The Device entity](normalization-entity-device.md).

name: Latitude
description: ISO 6709 coordinate representation (signed decimal).

name: Longitude
description: ISO 6709 coordinate representation (signed decimal).

name: Region
description:
The country/region subdivision name, using ISO 3166-2.

The list of codes can be found on the [International Standards Organization (ISO) website](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search).

name: RiskLevel
description: A risk level normalized to the range of 0 to a 100.

name: SchemaVersion
description: An ASIM schema version in the format `<major>.<minor>.<sub-minor>`

name: UserIdType
description:
The type of the ID stored in user ID fields.

Supported values are `SID`, `UIS`, `AADID`, `OktaId`, `AWSId`, and `PUID`. For more information, see [The User entity](normalization-entity-user.md).

name: UserType
description: The type of a user. For more information and list of allowed values, see [The User entity](normalization-entity-user.md).

name: Username
description: A simple or domain qualified username

name: UsernameType
description: The type of username stored in username fields. For more information and list of supported values, see [The User entity](normalization-entity-user.md).
